description: Container images to mirror from public registries to Harbor. Source tags are pinned to specific versions for reproducible installs. Destination names are relative to harbor_registry/library/. The 'architectures' field specifies which platforms to mirror; omit for default (amd64+arm64).

images.description: Alpine 3.22.4 from GCR mirror
